Implements app message receiving and sending functions, including queue management and error handling.


## Files
- **[app_message_receiver.c](app_message_receiver.c.md)**: Implements a receiver for app messages that writes to app memory and manages message forwarding and nacking.
- **[app_message_sender.c](app_message_sender.c.md)**: Implements functions for sending app messages, managing send queues, and handling outbox messages.
- **[app_message_sender.h](app_message_sender.h.md)**: Glue code for sending Pebble Protocol outbound messages using AppOutbox, with specific error handling.
